S.FORM: Uganda Itini i 1 00 N, 32 00 E, noAfilika ko Uganda. Polong no sekalay i 241,038 sq km "saka 81 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 197,100 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 43,938 sq km " Polong i 38,319,241 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 71.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 14.50%, malo no roma to a sera 14.30%. siyoto O (((Kampala)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 9 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Yoweri Museveni, patirengan a romi'ad i 1986 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 29 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: o~u~u*an…¨~…ģa itini i * ** n, ** ** …ô, no~uafi…ĺika ko~u o~u~u*an…¨~…ģa. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((kampa…ĺa)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakamo~u…ôt…ôp * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i jo~uw…ôri mo~u~us…ôb~v…ôni, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Uganda Itini i 1 00 N, 32 00 E, noAfilika ko Uganda. Polong no sekalay i 241,038 sq km "saka 81 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 197,100 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 43,938 sq km " Polong i 38,319,241 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 71.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 14.50%, malo no roma to a sera 14.30%. siyoto O (((Kampala)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 9 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Yoweri Museveni, patirengan a romi'ad i 1986 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 29 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: o~u~u*an…¨~…ģa itini i * ** n, ** ** …ô, no~uafi…ĺika ko~u o~u~u*an…¨~…ģa. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan.
